title: SessionCreateResponse
description: Response from Session Service after creating a session. Contains everything the Agent Host needs to begin work.

compatibilityStatus.description: Whether the client version is compatible with the backend.

policyBundle.description: Policy bundle for this session. Present when compatibilityStatus is 'compatible'.

name.description: Session name (empty until auto-named from first user prompt).

approvalUiEnabled.description: Whether the approval UI is active.

mcpEnabled.description: Whether MCP tool servers are allowed.
